mapper.insert: INSERT INTO match_record (match_id, user_a, user_b, status, a_op, b_op, unlock_flag, session_id, chat_round) VALUES (#{matchId}, #{userA}, #{userB}, #{status}, #{aOp}, #{bOp}, #{unlockFlag}, #{sessionId}, #{chatRound})
mapper.update: UPDATE match_record SET status = #{status}, a_op = #{aOp}, b_op = #{bOp}, unlock_flag = #{unlockFlag}, session_id = #{sessionId}, chat_round = #{chatRound} WHERE match_id = #{matchId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM match_record WHERE (user_a = #{userId} OR user_b = #{userId}) AND status IN (0, 1, 2, 3)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM match_record WHERE (user_a = #{userId} OR user_b = #{userId}) AND status IN (0, 1, 2, 3)

SELECT mr.match_id AS matchId, IF(mr.user_a = #{userId}, mr.user_b, mr.user_a) AS partnerId, pu.nick AS partnerNick, mr.status, mr.a_op AS aOp, mr.b_op AS bOp, mr.unlock_flag AS unlockFlag, mr.chat_round AS chatRound, mr.create_time AS createTime, mr.update_time AS updateTime, rpt.score, rpt.advantage FROM match_record mr INNER JOIN app_user pu ON pu.user_id = IF(mr.user_a = #{userId}, mr.user_b, mr.user_a) LEFT JOIN match_report rpt ON rpt.match_id = mr.match_id WHERE (mr.user_a = #{userId} OR mr.user_b = #{userId}) ORDER BY mr.create_time DESC

SELECT mr.match_id AS matchId, IF(mr.user_a = #{userId}, mr.user_b, mr.user_a) AS partnerUserId, pu.nick AS partnerNick, pu.gender AS partnerGender, mr.unlock_flag AS unlockFlag, (SELECT h.content FROM human_chat_message h WHERE h.match_id = mr.match_id ORDER BY h.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS lastMessage, (SELECT h.created_at FROM human_chat_message h WHERE h.match_id = mr.match_id ORDER BY h.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS lastTime FROM match_record mr INNER JOIN app_user pu ON pu.user_id = IF(mr.user_a = #{userId}, mr.user_b, mr.user_a) WHERE (mr.user_a = #{userId} OR mr.user_b = #{userId}) AND mr.unlock_flag = 1 ORDER BY mr.update_time DESC
